task_completion.description: Open the DICOM node configuration settings in Weasis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A preferences, settings, or DICOM configuration window is open in Weasis showing a list of DICOM nodes or an option to add a new destination.

task_completion.description: Configure the new DICOM destination node with the required parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration form or dialog in Weasis showing the entered details: Name/Description: 'Local PACS', AE Title: 'LOCAL_PACS', Hostname/IP: '127.0.0.1', and Port: '4242'.

task_completion.description: Open the DICOM Send dialog for the loaded study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'DICOM Send', 'Export', or similar dialog is visible in Weasis, showing the currently loaded study ready to be sent.

task_completion.description: Select the newly configured 'Local PACS' node as the destination.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The destination dropdown, list, or selection field in the DICOM Send dialog shows 'Local PACS' as the chosen destination.

task_completion.description: Send the DICOM series successfully to the configured node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, a status message indicating completion, or a progress bar reaching 100% for the DICOM send operation within Weasis.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Weasis GUI to configure and send the DICOM study.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Weasis menus, dialogs, and buttons rather than command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal-based DICOM tools to send the study.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like `storescu`, `dcmsend`, or similar tools being executed to send the DICOM files.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was done within the actual Weasis application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration fields and send dialogs are clearly part of the Weasis application interface, not a text editor or mock window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The destination node must be configured in Weasis with Name: 'Local PACS', AE Title: 'LOCAL_PACS', Hostname/IP: '127.0.0.1', and Port: '4242'.
